description: A photograph of many tightly wrapped rectangular packages stacked in a pyramid on the floor, the bundles wrapped in tan and red tape. Behind them is a printed backdrop with a Customs and Border Protection field-operations seal and text reading U.S. Customs and Border Protection, Office of Field Operations, Laredo Field Office, Port of Laredo, TX.
notable_text: U.S. Customs and Border Protection; Office of Field Operations; Laredo Field Office; Port of Laredo, TX
